scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix backend run test:unit && npm --prefix frontend run test:unit
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix backend run build:lambda && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
